creator: relaxbsd@gmail.com
text:
Tasty Menu is a K-Menu replacement for KDE 3.x series aiming to provide
the maximum usability and flexibility.
It provides three columns where you can always have all your favourite
applications in handy.

Key features:
    * One column for all your favourite applications and two columns for
      browsing all the installed programs
    * Search engine for the applications
    * Optional integration with Kerry Beagle or Strigi
    * Highlighting of recently installed applications
    * Fast user switching
    * Drag and drop support

WWW: http://www.notmart.org/tastymenu/
